title: Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1). The Strong Lensing Discovery Engine F -- Bright and low-redshift strong lenses
summary: We present 72 additional galaxy-galaxy strong lenses that complement the sample discovered in the Euclid Quick Release 1 data (63.1 deg^2) of the Strong Lens Discovery Engine (SLDE) papers A-E. It is shown that previous pre-selection of potential lenses, which excluded objects from the Gaia catalogue, led to missing several bright and low-redshift strong lenses, adding more than 10% new strong lens candidates compared to the previous search. In total, the catalogue includes 38 "grade A" (confident) and 34 "grade B" (probable) candidates. These lenses are identified through a combination of two independent searches for bright nearby objects: one based on machine-learning models followed by expert visual inspection, and the other based solely on expert visual inspection, targeting objects not included in the initial machine-learning selection (a limitation identified only after extensive visual inspection). With these additional strong lens candidates, we augment the expected number of high-confidence candidates in the Euclid Wide Survey from previous forecasts to 120000. Detailed semi-automated lens modelling confirms at least 41 systems out of 72, a fraction consistent with that found in SLDE A (315 out of 488). These include: multiple edge-on disc lenses; sources with arcs near the lens centre; "red sources"; and an edge-on disk galaxy lensing a galaxy merger, producing two sets of lensed features, an Einstein ring and a doubly imaged component. The median redshift of these systems is $Δ$ z ~ 0.3 lower than that of the SLDE A sample.

AI.tldr: 在Euclid Quick Release 1数据中发现了72个新的星系-星系强引力透镜候选体，通过改进的搜索方法找到了之前因排除Gaia目录对象而遗漏的明亮低红移透镜，使高置信度候选体总数达到38个。
AI.motivation: 之前基于机器学习模型的预筛选排除了Gaia目录中的对象，导致遗漏了许多明亮且红移较低的强引力透镜系统。本研究旨在通过改进搜索方法，发现这些被遗漏的透镜候选体，完善Euclid巡天中的强透镜样本。
AI.method: 采用两种独立搜索方法：1）基于机器学习模型筛选后专家目视检查；2）直接对未包含在初始机器学习选择中的对象进行专家目视检查。通过半自动透镜建模对候选体进行确认。
AI.result: 共发现72个新的强透镜候选体，其中38个为"A级"（高置信度），34个为"B级"（可能）。半自动建模确认了至少41个系统。这些透镜包括：多个侧向盘状透镜、弧线靠近透镜中心的源、"红色源"、以及一个透镜星系合并的侧向盘状星系。中位红移比SLDE A样本低约0.3。
AI.conclusion: 改进的搜索方法成功发现了之前遗漏的明亮低红移强透镜，将Euclid宽视场巡天中预期的高置信度候选体数量提升至12万个。这些新增样本丰富了强透镜的多样性，为宇宙学和星系形成研究提供了宝贵资源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了72个额外的星系-星系强透镜，这些透镜补充了在欧几里得快速发布1数据（63.1平方度）中通过强透镜发现引擎（SLDE）论文A-E所发现的样本。研究表明，先前对潜在透镜的预选排除了盖亚星表中的天体，导致遗漏了一些明亮且低红移的强透镜，与之前的搜索相比，新增了超过10%的强透镜候选体。总计，该星表包含38个“A级”（确信）和34个“B级”（可能）候选体。这些透镜通过两种独立搜索明亮近邻天体的方法识别：一种基于机器学习模型后经专家目视检查，另一种仅基于专家目视检查，针对未包含在初始机器学习选择中的天体（这一限制仅在广泛目视检查后才被发现）。通过这些额外的强透镜候选体，我们将欧几里得宽视场巡天中预期的高置信度候选体数量从此前的预测提升至12万个。详细的半自动透镜建模确认了72个系统中的至少41个，这一比例与SLDE A（488个中的315个）中发现的比例一致。这些系统包括：多个侧向盘状透镜；源位于透镜中心附近的弧；“红色源”；以及一个侧向盘状星系透镜化一个星系合并，产生两组透镜特征：一个爱因斯坦环和一个双重成像分量。这些系统的中值红移比SLDE A样本低约Δz ~ 0.3。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，改进的搜索方法成功发现了之前遗漏的明亮低红移强透镜，将欧几里得宽视场巡天中预期的高置信度候选体数量提升至12万个。这些新增样本丰富了强透镜的多样性，为宇宙学和星系形成研究提供了宝贵资源。

title: The Stellar IMF and Dark Matter Halo of ESO0286: Constraints from Strong Lensing and Dynamics
summary: The internal mass structure of elliptical galaxies offers critical insights into galaxy formation, yet disentangling stellar mass from dark matter and determining the stellar initial mass function (IMF) remains challenging. We present a detailed analysis of ESO0286-G022 ($z=0.0312$), a rare nearby strong-lens system with a fast-rotating elliptical galaxy, combining high-resolution Hubble Space Telescope (HST) imaging with VLT/MUSE integral-field stellar kinematics. We construct axisymmetric and triaxial Schwarzschild orbit-superposition models to reconstruct its intrinsic shape and mass distribution. Despite being a fast rotator, ESO0286 exhibits clear kinematic signatures of intrinsic triaxiality, characterized by rotation along both the major and minor axes, making it only the second such confirmed case. By incorporating the mass enclosed within the Einstein radius from strong lensing as a complementary constraint, we tightly anchor the total mass at large radii. This significantly reduces the uncertainty on the outer mass profile and orbital structure, demonstrating that only models with strong radial anisotropy beyond the IFU field of view are compatible with the data. In the inner regions, we robustly constrain an upper limit for the stellar mass around $r \sim 0.7$ kpc, ruling out an IMF more bottom-heavy than Kroupa, though a gentle gradient toward a slightly heavier central IMF is permitted. This aligns with recent dynamical studies of local massive early-type galaxies but contrasts with heavier IMFs reported for lenses at $z>0.1$. Our work demonstrates the power of combining lensing and dynamical modeling to resolve the detailed inner structure of massive galaxies.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合引力透镜和动力学建模，分析了ESO0286-G022椭圆星系的质量分布和恒星初始质量函数，发现其具有内在三轴性，排除了比Kroupa更重的IMF，展示了透镜与动力学结合在星系结构研究中的强大能力。
AI.motivation: 椭圆星系内部质量结构对理解星系形成至关重要，但区分恒星质量与暗物质、确定恒星初始质量函数(IMF)仍然具有挑战性。本研究旨在通过结合引力透镜和动力学建模来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 使用哈勃太空望远镜高分辨率成像和VLT/MUSE积分场恒星运动学数据，构建轴对称和三轴Schwarzschild轨道叠加模型来重建ESO0286-G022星系的固有形状和质量分布。利用强引力透镜的爱因斯坦半径内的质量作为补充约束。
AI.result: 尽管是快速旋转体，ESO0286显示出明确的内在三轴性特征（沿主轴和副轴旋转），这是第二个被确认的此类案例。强透镜约束显著减少了外质量剖面的不确定性，表明只有具有强径向各向异性的模型与数据兼容。在内部区域，排除了比Kroupa更重的IMF，但允许向中心略微加重的IMF梯度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了结合透镜和动力学建模在解析大质量星系详细内部结构方面的强大能力，结果与本地大质量早型星系的动力学研究一致，但与z>0.1透镜星系报告的较重IMF形成对比。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 椭圆星系的内部质量结构为星系形成提供了关键见解，然而将恒星质量与暗物质分离并确定恒星初始质量函数（IMF）仍然具有挑战性。我们对ESO0286-G022（红移z=0.0312）进行了详细分析，这是一个罕见的近邻强透镜系统，包含一个快速旋转的椭圆星系。我们结合了哈勃空间望远镜的高分辨率成像与VLT/MUSE积分场恒星运动学数据。我们构建了轴对称和三轴Schwarzschild轨道叠加模型，以重建其固有形状和质量分布。尽管ESO0286是一个快速旋转体，但它表现出明显的固有三轴性运动学特征，即沿长轴和短轴均有旋转，这使其成为第二个被确认的此类案例。通过将强透镜约束的爱因斯坦半径内质量作为补充约束，我们严格锚定了大半径处的总质量。这显著减小了外部质量轮廓和轨道结构的不确定性，表明只有IFU视场外具有强径向各向异性的模型才与数据兼容。在内部区域，我们稳健地约束了约0.7千秒差距处恒星质量的上限，排除了比Kroupa IMF更底重的IMF，但允许向中心略重的IMF存在平缓梯度。这与近期对本地大质量早型星系的动力学研究一致，但与红移大于0.1的透镜星系中报告的更重IMF形成对比。我们的工作展示了结合透镜和动力学建模来解析大质量星系详细内部结构的能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究展示了结合透镜和动力学建模在解析大质量星系详细内部结构方面的强大能力，结果与本地大质量早型星系的动力学研究一致，但与z>0.1透镜星系报告的较重IMF形成对比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Photometric and kinematic constraints for the lens ESO0286. Left: HST/F814W image of the lens overlaid with the MUSE WFM FoV (white rectangle). The coordinate system ( \(x,y\) ) aligns with the galaxy’s photometric major and minor axes, respectively. The upper inset provides a zoom-in of the central region to highlight the dust structure, while dashed circles mark lensed images A and B (shown in the bottom insets). Right: Predicted \(M_{Ein}\) in units of \(10^{10}\penalty 10000\ M_{\odot}\) , derived from lensing and dynamical modeling. The more transparent green and orange regions show the probability density distribution of \(M_{Ein}^{lens}\) constrained only by image positions and flux ratios, while the less transparent regions correspond to models constrained by the extended images in the F814W and F336W bands. The vertical black line and gray shaded region indicate the inferred value, \(\overline{M_{Ein}^{lens}}=(8.85\pm 0.38)\times 10^{10}\penalty 10000\ M_{\odot}\) , based on the best-fit EPL-ESR and PIEMD-ESR models. The gray dashed line marks the lens mass derived by C18 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：透镜ESO0286的光度与运动学约束。左图：HST/F814W波段透镜图像，叠加了MUSE WFM视场（白色矩形）。坐标系 (\(x,y\)) 分别与星系的光度主轴和次轴对齐。上方插图为中央区域的放大图，以突出尘埃结构，虚线圆圈标记了透镜图像A和B（显示在下方插图中）。右图：由透镜和动力学建模预测的以 \(10^{10}\penalty 10000\ M_{\odot}\) 为单位的 \(M_{Ein}\) 。较透明的绿色和橙色区域表示仅由图像位置和流量比约束的 \(M_{Ein}^{lens}\) 的概率密度分布，而较不透明的区域对应于由F814W和F336W波段的扩展图像约束的模型。垂直黑线和灰色阴影区域表示基于最佳拟合EPL-ESR和PIEMD-ESR模型推断的值 \(\overline{M_{Ein}^{lens}}=(8.85\pm 0.38)\times 10^{10}\penalty 10000\ M_{\odot}\) 。灰色虚线标记了C18推导的透镜质量。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Strong lensing model parameters with associated 1- \(\sigma\) uncertainties. 2 2 2 We show the median value with the corresponding 1- \(\sigma\) uncertainty derived from the models that use the extended images as constraints. The predicted flux ratios from the best-fit models are consistent with the measured value of \(2.2\pm 0.1\) reported in C18 .

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Setup for the mass distribution in the dynamical modeling, illustrating the implementation of the stellar mass-to-light ratio gradient. The inner radius \(r_{i}\) is fixed at 0.1 kpc. The mass-to-light ratios \(\Upsilon_{\ast,i}\) and \(\Upsilon_{\ast,f}\) , as well as the outer radius \(r_{f}\) , are allowed to vary during the dynamical modeling. As indicated by the shaded region and dotted lines, the variation range for \(r_{f}\) is restricted to between \(r_{f,min}=0.45\) kpc and \(r_{f,max}=1.2\) kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：动力学建模中质量分布的设置，说明了恒星质光比梯度的实现。内半径 \(r_{i}\) 固定为0.1千秒差距。质光比 \(\Upsilon_{\ast,i}\) 和 \(\Upsilon_{\ast,f}\) 以及外半径 \(r_{f}\) 在动力学建模过程中允许变化。如阴影区域和虚线所示， \(r_{f}\) 的变化范围限制在 \(r_{f,min}=0.45\) 千秒差距和 \(r_{f,max}=1.2\) 千秒差距之间。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Summary of the dynamical mass models explored in this work. 3 3 3 The columns describe the assumed intrinsic symmetry, the treatment of the outer stellar mass to light ratio \(\Upsilon_{*,f}\) , the inclusion of strong lensing constraints \(\overline{M_{Ein}^{lens}}\) (see Eq. 13 ), the sampled DM halo parameters, and the primary motivation for each configuration. In the “Constraints” column, K denotes kinematic data from MUSE WFM, while K & L indicates the inclusion of strong lensing constraints. The color of each Model ID corresponds to the individual AIC envelopes plotted in Figs. 5 and 15 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本工作中探索的动力学质量模型总结。3 3 3 各列描述了假定的固有对称性、外部恒星质光比 \(\Upsilon_{*,f}\) 的处理方式、强透镜约束 \(\overline{M_{Ein}^{lens}}\) （见方程13）的包含情况、采样的暗物质晕参数以及每种配置的主要动机。在“约束”列中，K表示来自MUSE WFM的运动学数据，而K & L表示包含强透镜约束。每个模型ID的颜色对应于图5和图15中绘制的各个AIC包络线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Kinematic data and modeling. title: The velocity dispersion function of red galaxies in four Hubble Frontier Fields galaxy clusters
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables, accepted for publication by Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present a detailed study of the stellar kinematic properties of red member galaxies in the cores of four strong lensing galaxy clusters at intermediate redshift included in the the Hubble Frontier Fields programme: Abell 2744 ($z=0.307$), Abell S1063 ($z=0.346$), MACS J0416.1$-$2403 ($z=0.397$), and MACS J1149.6$+$2223 ($z=0.542$). We focussed on a sample of 723 red cluster members in the four clusters and we measured their structural parameters using MORPHOFIT for all Hubble Frontier Fields bands. Taking advantage of deep (3.1h to 17h of exposure) integral-field spectroscopy from MUSE on the Very Large Telescope, we tested a pipeline based on the public spectral fitting code pPXF to systematically measure the line-of-sight stellar velocity dispersion $σ$ of cluster members with a spectral $S/N\geq 10$, with a statistical uncertainty consistently below 5%. The resulting catalogue contains 213 measured $σ$ values across the four clusters. We calibrated the Fundamental Plane relation in the rest-frame $r$ band for the early-type cluster members, selected from their colour and morphology, finding compatible parameters both across the clusters, and noting hints of zero-point evolution with redshift. Finally, we used the calibrated Fundamental Plane relations to assign a velocity dispersion value to all 723 red cluster members and studied the velocity dispersion function for each cluster, down to $\log σ\, \mathrm{[km \, s^{-1}] = 1.5}$. A Schechter-function fit of the velocity functions suggests compatible parameters: a positive $α$ slope with values in the range $0.55-1.60$, and $\logσ^*\, [\mathrm{km\,s^{-1}}]$ between $2.18$ and $2.47$. Compared to previous works, we extend the systematic study of the central velocity dispersion of cluster galaxies to lower-$σ$ regimes.

AI.tldr: 该研究对哈勃前沿场计划中四个中红移强引力透镜星系团的红色成员星系进行了详细的恒星运动学分析，测量了213个星系的视线速度弥散度，校准了早型星系的基本平面关系，并研究了速度弥散度函数。
AI.motivation: 研究中红移星系团中星系恒星运动学性质，特别是扩展到低速度弥散度区域，以更好地理解星系团中星系的动力学演化。
AI.method: 使用MORPHOFIT测量723个红色成员星系的结构参数，利用MUSE积分场光谱仪数据，基于pPXF代码系统测量视线速度弥散度，校准基本平面关系，并分析速度弥散度函数。
AI.result: 获得了213个速度弥散度测量值，校准了早型星系的基本平面关系，发现不同星系团间参数兼容，并检测到零点随红移演化的迹象。速度弥散度函数的Schechter函数拟合显示α斜率在0.55-1.60之间，σ*在2.18-2.47之间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将星系团星系中心速度弥散度的系统研究扩展到低σ区域，为理解星系团中星系的动力学演化提供了重要数据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们详细研究了哈勃前沿场计划中四个中等红移强引力透镜星系团核心区域红色成员星系的恒星运动学性质：Abell 2744（z=0.307）、Abell S1063（z=0.346）、MACS J0416.1−2403（z=0.397）和MACS J1149.6+2223（z=0.542）。我们聚焦于四个星系团中723个红色成员星系的样本，并使用MORPHOFIT测量了它们在所有哈勃前沿场波段中的结构参数。利用甚大望远镜MUSE的深场（曝光时间3.1小时至17小时）积分场光谱，我们测试了一个基于公共光谱拟合代码pPXF的流程，以系统测量成员星系的视线方向恒星速度弥散度σ，要求光谱信噪比S/N≥10，统计不确定性始终低于5%。最终目录包含四个星系团中213个测量的σ值。我们校准了早型成员星系（根据颜色和形态选取）在静止系r波段的基本平面关系，发现各星系团参数兼容，并注意到零点随红移演化的迹象。最后，我们利用校准后的基本平面关系为所有723个红色成员星系分配速度弥散度值，并研究了每个星系团的速度弥散度函数，下限至logσ [km s^{-1}] = 1.5。速度函数的Schechter函数拟合表明参数兼容：α斜率正值，范围在0.55–1.60之间，logσ* [km s^{-1}]介于2.18和2.47之间。与先前工作相比，我们将星系团星系中心速度弥散度的系统研究扩展到了更低σ区域。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究将星系团星系中心速度弥散度的系统研究扩展到低σ区域，为理解星系团中星系的动力学演化提供了重要数据。

title: Star Formation Beyond the Optical Disk : The Low-Density Outskirts of NGC2090
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A, 13 pages, 10 figures
summary: We present a far-ultraviolet (FUV) analysis of the star-forming complexes (SFCs) in the nearby spiral galaxy NGC\,2090, based on observations from the Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UVIT), and compare it with emission from the optical and infrared bands. NGC\,2090 exhibits prominent star formation in its extended outer disk, with FUV emission traced out to $\sim$30 kpc, far beyond the truncation of the old stellar disk at $\sim$5 kpc. It is classified as an extended UV (XUV) disk galaxy. We identify and characterize the SFCs both within and beyond the optical radius (R$_{25}$), estimating their physical sizes and star formation rates (SFRs). The outer-disk SFCs are generally smaller in area and show a narrower distribution of SFR surface density ($Σ_{\mathrm{SFR}}$) compared to the inner-disk SFCs. We investigate the properties of the inner disk using mid-infrared data from the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST), and find that the polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon (PAH) emission is strongly correlated with regions of active star formation. The specific SFR (sSFR) increases with radius, consistent with a scenario of inside-out disk growth. The observed number of SFCs and their H$α$-to-FUV flux ratios in the outer disk of NGC\,2090 indicate ongoing massive star formation and are consistent with a top-heavy IMF, implying that the upper end of the IMF is not truncated in the low-density, metal-poor outskirts. These results suggest that XUV disks can host significant massive star formation despite their low stellar density and metallicity.

AI.tldr: 对NGC 2090星系进行远紫外分析，发现其具有延伸紫外盘特征，外盘星形成复合体面积较小但存在大质量恒星形成，表明IMF上端在低密度贫金属环境中未被截断。
AI.motivation: 研究邻近螺旋星系NGC 2090的星形成复合体特性，特别关注其延伸紫外盘现象，探索在低密度、贫金属的外盘环境中大质量恒星形成的可能性。
AI.method: 使用紫外成像望远镜(UVIT)进行远紫外观测，结合光学和红外波段数据，识别和表征星形成复合体，估算物理尺寸和恒星形成率，并利用JWST中红外数据分析PAH发射。
AI.result: NGC 2090具有延伸紫外盘特征，FUV发射延伸至约30 kpc，远超老恒星盘截断位置(约5 kpc)。外盘星形成复合体面积较小，恒星形成率面密度分布较窄。sSFR随半径增加，符合由内向外盘增长模型。外盘Hα与FUV通量比表明存在大质量恒星形成，IMF上端未被截断。
AI.conclusion: 延伸紫外盘即使在低恒星密度和贫金属环境中也能支持显著的大质量恒星形成，IMF上端在星系外缘并未被截断，这为理解星系外盘恒星形成机制提供了重要见解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于紫外成像望远镜（UVIT）的观测，对邻近旋涡星系NGC 2090中恒星形成复合体（SFCs）进行了远紫外（FUV）分析，并将其与光学和红外波段的辐射进行了比较。NGC 2090在其延伸的外盘展现出显著的恒星形成活动，FUV辐射可追踪至约30 kpc，远超过老年恒星盘在约5 kpc处的截断。该星系被归类为延伸紫外（XUV）盘星系。我们识别并表征了光学半径（R₂₅）内外的SFCs，估算了它们的物理尺度和恒星形成率（SFRs）。与内盘SFCs相比，外盘SFCs通常面积更小，且其恒星形成率面密度（Σ_SFR）分布更窄。我们利用詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的中红外数据研究了内盘性质，发现多环芳烃（PAH）辐射与活跃恒星形成区域密切相关。比恒星形成率（sSFR）随半径增加而增大，这与由内而外盘生长的情景一致。NGC 2090外盘中观测到的SFCs数量及其Hα与FUV流量比表明存在持续的大质量恒星形成，并与上端偏重的初始质量函数（IMF）一致，这意味着在低密度、贫金属的外围区域，IMF的上端并未被截断。这些结果表明，XUV盘即使在低恒星密度和低金属丰度环境下也能孕育显著的大质量恒星形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：延伸紫外盘即使在低恒星密度和贫金属环境中也能支持显著的大质量恒星形成，IMF上端在星系外缘并未被截断，这为理解星系外盘恒星形成机制提供了重要见解。

title: Catching the Nebular Needle in a Polluted Haystack: Line-emission Signatures from Population III-forming Pockets around Massive Galaxies at the End of Reionization
comment: 24 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to APJ
summary: Finding the first generation of (Population III or Pop III) stars is one of the most ambitious and exciting challenges of astrophysics. JWST opened concrete prospects for their detection during the Epoch of Reionization (EoR), where increasing evidence suggests that residual Pop III formation may persist, even within pristine pockets of high-mass halos, due to inhomogeneous enrichment. However, the identification of Pop III stars within globally enriched environments will be challenging. We investigate the detectability of a subdominant Pop III component in/around massive ($M_\star \gtrsim 10^9 ~\mathrm{M_\odot}$) galaxies at $z \approx 6.5 - 9$ from the dustyGadget cosmological simulation suite, and the confusion arising from second-generation (Pop II) stars in their surroundings. We find that young ($\lesssim 1$ Myr), massive ($M_\mathrm{III} \sim 6 \times 10^5 ~\mathrm{M_\odot}$) Pop III clusters forming within these galaxy environments are responsible for strong HeII1640 line emission ($L_\mathrm{HeII1640} \gtrsim 10^{41} ~\mathrm{erg \, s^{-1}}$), which would be detectable with $\approx 10 (50)$ h of medium-resolution observations with NIRSpec/IFU at $z \approx 6 (10)$. These bright luminosities cannot be produced by standard Pop II populations alone. On the other hand, the dominant Pop II component within massive ``hybrid'' Pop III hosts powers strong metal line emission ($L_\mathrm{[OIII]5007} \gtrsim 10^{42} ~\mathrm{erg \, s^{-1}}$), indicating that the detection of metal lines alone cannot exclude the presence of Pop IIIs in high-$z$ galaxy environments. We further discuss candidate selection strategies based on Ly$α$, H$α$ and H$β$ emission, and how spatially resolved observations may enable the detection of isolated, pristine pockets in the outskirts of massive halos.

AI.tldr: JWST时代探测第一代恒星（Pop III）的可行性研究：在富金属环境中识别年轻大质量Pop III星团通过HeII1640谱线发射，而金属谱线不能排除Pop III存在。
AI.motivation: JWST为再电离时期探测第一代恒星（Pop III）提供了可能，但如何在全球富金属环境中识别残留的Pop III形成是一个挑战。需要研究在富金属星系环境中探测Pop III成分的可行性及其与第二代恒星（Pop II）的混淆问题。
AI.method: 使用dustyGadget宇宙学模拟套件，研究在z≈6.5-9的大质量星系（M⋆≳10⁹ M⊙）环境中亚主导Pop III成分的可探测性。分析年轻（≲1 Myr）、大质量（MIII∼6×10⁵ M⊙）Pop III星团产生的HeII1640谱线发射，并与Pop II主导的金属谱线发射进行对比。
AI.result: 在这些星系环境中形成的年轻大质量Pop III星团会产生强烈的HeII1640谱线发射（LHeII1640≳10⁴¹ erg s⁻¹），使用NIRSpec/IFU在z≈6(10)进行中等分辨率观测10(50)小时即可探测。这些亮度无法由标准Pop II群体单独产生。另一方面，大质量"混合"Pop III宿主中的主导Pop II成分会产生强烈的金属谱线发射（L[OIII]5007≳10⁴² erg s⁻¹），表明仅探测到金属谱线不能排除高红移星系环境中Pop III的存在。
AI.conclusion: HeII1640谱线发射是探测富金属环境中Pop III成分的关键诊断工具，而金属谱线发射不能作为排除Pop III存在的标准。空间分辨观测可能有助于探测大质量晕外围孤立原始区域中的Pop III恒星形成。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 寻找第一代（第三星族或Pop III）恒星是天体物理学中最雄心勃勃且令人兴奋的挑战之一。JWST为在再电离时期探测它们开辟了具体前景，越来越多的证据表明，由于非均匀增丰，即使在高质量晕的原始区域中，残留的Pop III形成也可能持续存在。然而，在全球增丰环境中识别Pop III恒星将具有挑战性。我们利用dustyGadget宇宙学模拟套件，研究了在红移z ≈ 6.5 - 9处、大质量（M_⋆ ≳ 10^9 M_⊙）星系内部/周围次主导的Pop III成分的可探测性，以及其周围第二代（Pop II）恒星引起的混淆。我们发现，在这些星系环境中形成的年轻（≲ 1 Myr）、大质量（M_III ∼ 6 × 10^5 M_⊙）Pop III星团会产生强烈的HeII1640谱线发射（L_HeII1640 ≳ 10^41 erg s^{-1}），在z ≈ 6 (10)处使用NIRSpec/IFU进行约10 (50)小时的中等分辨率观测即可探测到。这些明亮的光度无法仅由标准Pop II星族产生。另一方面，在大质量“混合”Pop III宿主中主导的Pop II成分驱动着强烈的金属谱线发射（L_[OIII]5007 ≳ 10^42 erg s^{-1}），这表明仅凭金属谱线的探测不能排除高红移星系环境中Pop III的存在。我们进一步讨论了基于Lyα、Hα和Hβ发射的候选体选择策略，以及空间分辨观测如何可能探测到大质量晕外围孤立的原始区域。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：HeII1640谱线发射是探测富金属环境中Pop III成分的关键诊断工具，而金属谱线发射不能作为排除Pop III存在的标准。空间分辨观测可能有助于探测大质量晕外围孤立原始区域中的Pop III恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the four fiducial configurations in our Cloudy runs for the H number density of the clouds ( \(n_{{H}}\) ) as a function of the age of their enclosed stellar population ( \(t_{\star}\) ). Each column reports the value of the number density – expressed as Log \((n_{{H}}/${c}{m}^{-3}$)\) – assigned to a given range of ages in the various configurations (one per table row, with the name of each configuration in the first column).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们Cloudy运行中四种基准配置的总结，展示了云团的H数密度 ( \(n_{{H}}\) ) 随其内部星族年龄 ( \(t_{\star}\) ) 的变化。每一列报告了分配给不同年龄范围（每种配置一行，第一列为配置名称）的数密度值（以Log \((n_{{H}}/${c}{m}^{-3}$)\) 表示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Total (Pop III + Pop II) SFR averaged over 100 Myr ( \(\langle{SFR}\rangle_{{100~Myr}}\) ) as a function of total stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ) for the Pop III-hosting halos considered in this study ( red circles ), compared with benchmark Pop II-only halos ( grey dots ). The right axis shows the corresponding UV magnitudes ( \(M_{{UV}}\) ) assuming a simple SFR-UV luminosity conversion as in Madau and Dickinson ( 2014 ) (see text). We compare with the \(M_{{UV}}\) vs \(M_{\star}\) of faint, “pure” Pop III galaxy candidates (LAP1, Nakajima et al. 2026 , and AMORE6, Morishita et al. 2025 , filled, colored circles ), and with brighter, “hybrid” Pop III candidates (RXJ2129-z8HeII, Wang et al. 2024 , EXCELS-63107 Cullen et al. 2025 , GN-z11, Bunker et al. 2023 ; Maiolino et al. 2024 , 2026 ; Übler et al. 2026 , and GNHeII J1236+6215, Mondal et al. 2025 , empty, colored circles ) proposed at \(z\gtrsim 3\) . Observed candidates cover a broad range of \(M_{\star}\) and \(M_{{UV}}\) , with our halo sample lying in a regime largely unexplored by “classical” Pop III models: while classical models typically focus on low-mass, Pop III-dominated systems, here we consider massive halos dominated by Pop II star formation, but hosting sub-dominant Pop III-forming clumps in their environment. Note that both axes have a broken range marked by “ \(\approx\) ” symbols, in order to fit the faint LAP1 and AMORE6 constraints on the bottom-left corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本研究中Pop III宿主晕（红色圆圈）的总（Pop III + Pop II）恒星形成率（100 Myr平均，\(\langle{SFR}\rangle_{{100~Myr}}\)）作为总恒星质量 ( \(M_{\star}\) ) 的函数，与基准的纯Pop II晕（灰色点）进行比较。右轴显示了相应的紫外星等 ( \(M_{{UV}}\) )，假设采用Madau and Dickinson (2014) 的简单SFR-UV光度转换（见正文）。我们将其与暗弱的“纯”Pop III星系候选体（LAP1, Nakajima et al. 2026, 和AMORE6, Morishita et al. 2025, 填充彩色圆圈）以及更明亮的“混合”Pop III候选体（RXJ2129-z8HeII, Wang et al. 2024; EXCELS-63107, Cullen et al. 2025; GN-z11, Bunker et al. 2023; Maiolino et al. 2024, 2026; Übler et al. 2026; 和GNHeII J1236+6215, Mondal et al. 2025, 空心彩色圆圈）在z≳3处的 \(M_{{UV}}\) 与 \(M_{\star}\) 进行比较。观测到的候选体覆盖了广泛的 \(M_{\star}\) 和 \(M_{{UV}}\) 范围，我们的晕样本处于“经典”Pop III模型尚未充分探索的区间：经典模型通常关注低质量、Pop III主导的系统，而这里我们考虑的是由Pop II恒星形成主导但环境中存在次主导Pop III形成团块的大质量晕。注意，两个坐标轴均用“≈”符号标记了断裂范围，以便在左下角容纳暗弱的LAP1和AMORE6约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: HeII emission line luminosities from individual Pop III-forming clumps at 1640 Å ( left ) and 4686 Å ( right ), as a function of the age of the enclosed stellar populations, assuming a H number density around the stellar populations of \(n_{{H}}=10^{4}~${c}{m}^{-3}$\) ( dark-red, smaller dots ) and \(n_{{H}}=10^{3.7}~${c}{m}^{-3}$\) ( red, larger dots ) respectively, and an efficiency factor \(\eta_{{III}}=0.3\) (corresponding to a Pop III mass of approximately \(6\times 10^{5}~{M_{\odot}}\) ). For a stellar population of age \(\sim 1.5\) Myr, other values of \(n_{{H}}\) explored in the model are shown with progressively lighter shades of red and progressively larger dots (with a zoom around the blended points in the top-right insets ). Dark-red/cyan horizontal, solid lines show a comparison with the simple analytical model of Venditti et al. ( 2024a ) , assuming no/strong mass loss, and the same \(\eta_{{III}}=0.3\) . Sensitivity thresholds at a \({SNR}\sim 3\) for medium-resolution observations with JWST/NIRSpec/IFU are also shown as dotted lines , considering \(\sim 10\) h ( grey ) and \(\sim 50\) h ( gold ) of total integration time for sources at \(z=10\) ( thin ) and \(z=6\) ( thick ). The HeII line luminosity constraints of the observed Pop III candidates RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al. , 2024 ) , GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al. , 2025 ) , LAP1 (Nakajima et al. , 2026 ) , and Hebe (Maiolino et al. , 2026 ) are also shown as colored circles , with arbitrary positioning on the \(x\) axis. The HeII emission decreases by up to \(\sim 3\) dex with stellar age within the first 3 Myr. Only populations younger than \(\sim 1\) Myr remain marginally detectable with \(\sim 10\) h of observations up to \(z\approx 10\) (HeII1640), or \(\sim 50\) h up to \(z\approx 6\) (HeII4686). In contrast, a much smaller variation of \(\sim 0.5\) dex is found when varying \(n_{{H}}\) by 3 orders of magnitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：单个Pop III形成团块在1640 Å（左）和4686 Å（右）处的HeII发射线光度，作为其内部星族年龄的函数，假设星族周围的H数密度分别为 \(n_{{H}}=10^{4}~${c}{m}^{-3}$\)（深红色，较小点）和 \(n_{{H}}=10^{3.7}~${c}{m}^{-3}$\)（红色，较大点），效率因子 \(\eta_{{III}}=0.3\)（对应Pop III质量约为 \(6\times 10^{5}~{M_{\odot}}\)）。对于年龄约为1.5 Myr的星族，模型中探索的其他 \(n_{{H}}\) 值以渐变的红色和渐大的点显示（右上角插图中混合点附近有放大）。深红色/青色水平实线显示了与Venditti et al. (2024a) 简单分析模型的比较，假设无/强质量损失，且 \(\eta_{{III}}=0.3\) 相同。还显示了JWST/NIRSpec/IFU中等分辨率观测在信噪比约3时的灵敏度阈值，考虑了对红移z=10（细线）和z=6（粗线）源的总积分时间约10小时（灰色）和约50小时（金色）。观测到的Pop III候选体RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al., 2024)、GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al., 2025)、LAP1 (Nakajima et al., 2026) 和Hebe (Maiolino et al., 2026) 的HeII线光度约束也以彩色圆圈显示，在x轴上位置任意。HeII发射在最初3 Myr内随星龄下降多达约3 dex。只有年龄小于约1 Myr的星族在z≈10处通过约10小时观测（HeII1640）或在z≈6处通过约50小时观测（HeII4686）仍勉强可探测。相比之下，当 \(n_{{H}}\) 变化3个数量级时，光度变化仅约0.5 dex。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Integrated HeII line luminosity at 1640 Å ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) ) vs 4686 Å ( \(L_{{HeII4686}}\) ) arising from each halo within our Pop III halo sample and from benchmark Pop II-only halos at \(z\approx 6.5-9\) (Section II.3 ), assuming our reference Cloudy configurations (Section II.2.2 ). The total (Pop III + Pop II) HeII emission arising from Pop III-hosting halos and the contribution to the emission coming from confusing Pop II populations in these halos is shown by red/black circles , respectively; the HeII emission of benchmark Pop II-only halos is shown instead by black dots . We identify two main regions of interest for Pop III-hosting halos: a “confused” region ( orange shaded area ), in which the HeII emission arising from Pop III stars cannot be disentangled from a potential underlying Pop II floor, and an “unconfused” region ( purple shaded area ), which can only be reached through a Pop III contribution, allowing a more straightforward identification. The HeII luminosity of observed Pop III candidates (RXJ2129-z8HeII, Wang et al. 2024 , GNHeII-J1236+6215, Mondal et al. 2025 , Hebe, Maiolino et al. 2026 , and LAP1, Nakajima et al. 2026 ) and sensitivity thresholds for JWST/NIRSpec are shown as in Figure 2 , as well as a comparison with the simple analytical model of fig. 2 of Venditti et al. ( 2024a ) . Note that for GNHeII-J1236+6215, Hebe and LAP1, no constraints are available on the HeII4686 line, therefore measures of the HeII1640 line luminosity are shown out of the \(x\) -axis boundaries of the plot to avoid confusion.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在z≈6.5-9处（第II.3节），我们的Pop III晕样本和基准纯Pop II晕中每个晕产生的1640 Å ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) ) 与4686 Å ( \(L_{{HeII4686}}\) ) 处的积分HeII线光度，假设采用我们的参考Cloudy配置（第II.2.2节）。Pop III宿主晕产生的总（Pop III + Pop II）HeII发射以及这些晕中混淆的Pop II星族对发射的贡献分别由红色/黑色圆圈显示；基准纯Pop II晕的HeII发射则由黑色点显示。我们为Pop III宿主晕识别了两个主要感兴趣区域：“混淆”区域（橙色阴影区域），其中Pop III恒星产生的HeII发射无法与潜在的Pop II本底区分开；“非混淆”区域（紫色阴影区域），该区域只能通过Pop III贡献达到，从而允许更直接的识别。观测到的Pop III候选体（RXJ2129-z8HeII, Wang et al. 2024; GNHeII-J1236+6215, Mondal et al. 2025; Hebe, Maiolino et al. 2026; 和LAP1, Nakajima et al. 2026）的HeII光度以及JWST/NIRSpec的灵敏度阈值如图2所示，并与Venditti et al. (2024a) 图2中的简单分析模型进行了比较。注意，对于GNHeII-J1236+6215、Hebe和LAP1，没有HeII4686线的约束，因此为避免混淆，HeII1640线光度的测量值显示在图的x轴边界之外。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Fraction of the total HeII1640 line emission of Pop III-hosting halos from Figure 3 that is contributed by Pop III stars, as a function of the mass-weighted age of the Pop III stellar populations in each halo. Data points are color-coded according to the level of embedding in the assumed Cloudy configurations (as in Table 1 ). The fractional contribution of Pop IIIs to the emission strongly decreases with age, with only a factor two scatter typically resulting from different assumed Cloudy configurations. All halos host a single Pop III stellar population, with the exception of the halos shown as squares (hosting two Pop III populations) and the halos shown as in triangles (hosting four Pop III populations).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自图3的Pop III宿主晕的总HeII1640线发射中由Pop III恒星贡献的比例，作为每个晕中Pop III星族质量加权年龄的函数。数据点根据假定的Cloudy配置（如表1所示）的嵌入程度进行颜色编码。Pop III对发射的贡献比例随年龄强烈下降，不同Cloudy配置通常仅导致约两倍的散射。所有晕都包含单个Pop III星族，但以正方形显示的晕（包含两个Pop III星族）和以三角形显示的晕（包含四个Pop III星族）除外。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Integrated HeII1640 line emission ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) ) from our Pop III halo sample and from benchmark Pop II-only systems (same as in Figure 3 ) as a function of their Ly \(\alpha\) ( \(L_{{Ly\alpha}}\) , first panel ), H \(\alpha\) ( \(L_{{H\alpha}}\) , second panel ), H \(\beta\) ( \(L_{{H\beta}}\) , third panel ) and H \(\beta\) + [OIII]5007 ( \(L_{{H\beta+[OIII]5007}}\) , last panel ) line luminosity. Data points are color-coded according to the level of embedding in the assumed Cloudy configurations (as in Table 1 ). Pop III systems ( red-scale ) are fully degenerate with the emission from Pop II stellar populations ( grey-scale ) in terms of their HI line luminosities, making these lines alone ineffective for distinguishing the two populations. However, Pop III sources with strong HeII emission above the confusion limit ( red, dashed, horizontal line , corresponding to the purple shaded region in Figure 3 ) can still be identified. These “unconfused” Pop III systems occupy the red shaded regions of the diagram, which therefore highlights promising areas of HI luminosities for selecting potential Pop III systems above the confusion limit. Measurements of the HeII and HI lines for the observed “hybrid” Pop III candidates RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al. , 2024 ) and GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al. , 2025 ) are also shown as a comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：来自我们的Pop III晕样本和基准纯Pop II系统（与图3相同）的积分HeII1640线发射 ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) )，作为其Lyα ( \(L_{{Ly\alpha}}\) , 第一面板)、Hα ( \(L_{{H\alpha}}\) , 第二面板)、Hβ ( \(L_{{H\beta}}\) , 第三面板) 和Hβ + [OIII]5007 ( \(L_{{H\beta+[OIII]5007}}\) , 最后一面板) 线光度的函数。数据点根据假定的Cloudy配置（如表1所示）的嵌入程度进行颜色编码。Pop III系统（红色系）在HI线光度方面与Pop II星族（灰色系）的发射完全简并，使得单独使用这些线无法有效区分这两个星族。然而，具有高于混淆极限（红色虚线水平线，对应图3中的紫色阴影区域）的强HeII发射的Pop III源仍然可以被识别。这些“非混淆”Pop III系统占据了图中的红色阴影区域，因此突出了在混淆极限之上选择潜在Pop III系统的有希望的HI光度区域。观测到的“混合”Pop III候选体RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al., 2024) 和GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al., 2025) 的HeII和HI线测量结果也作为比较显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Integrated HeII1640 line emission ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) ) from our Pop III halo sample and from benchmark Pop II-only systems (same as in Figure 3 ) as a function of their [OIII]5007 line luminosity ( \(L_{{[OIII]5007}}\) ), with “unconfused” and “confused” Pop III systems (see Figure 3 ) highlighted in purple- and orange-scale , respectively. Data points are color-coded according to the level of embedding in the assumed Cloudy configurations (as in Table 1 ). Pop III-hosting halos are bright O line emitters, and while they are typically shifted towards the left-hand side of the O32 vs R23 optical line diagnostic plane ( top right ), this is due to their larger H \(\beta\) emission, as demonstrated by their positioning in the \(L_{{H\beta}}-L_{{[OIII]5007}}\) plane ( bottom right ). Results are compared with available constraints on the observed “hybrid” Pop III candidates RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al. , 2024 ) , GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al. , 2025 ) and EXCELS-63107 (Cullen et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左图：来自我们的Pop III晕样本和基准纯Pop II系统（与图3相同）的积分HeII1640线发射 ( \(L_{{HeII1640}}\) )，作为其[OIII]5007线光度 ( \(L_{{[OIII]5007}}\) ) 的函数，其中“非混淆”和“混淆”Pop III系统（见图3）分别以紫色和橙色系突出显示。数据点根据假定的Cloudy配置（如表1所示）的嵌入程度进行颜色编码。Pop III宿主晕是明亮的O线发射体，虽然它们通常向O32与R23光学线诊断平面（右上）的左侧偏移，但这是由于它们更强的Hβ发射，如它们在 \(L_{{H\beta}}-L_{{[OIII]5007}}\) 平面（右下）中的位置所示。结果与观测到的“混合”Pop III候选体RXJ2129-z8HeII (Wang et al., 2024)、GNHeII-J1236+621 (Mondal et al., 2025) 和EXCELS-63107 (Cullen et al., 2025) 的可用约束进行了比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Left: scheme of a Pop III-hosting halo, showing the distance of a Pop III stellar particle from the center-of-mass (CM) of the halo and from its closest Pop II particle. While all particles are physically separated in the simulation, their HII ( light-blue ) and HeIII ( purple ) regions may overlap, depending on the respective size of the ionized regions. Right: distance of the closest Pop II particle as a function of the distance from the CM for all Pop III particles in our sample. The resolution element and FoV of NIRSpec/IFU are shown as a reference at \(z=10\) and \(z=6\) ( thin/thick, golden, dotted line ), as well as the inferred distance from the galaxy center of GN-z11 of the HeII clump identified by Maiolino et al. ( 2024 , 2026 ) ( blue, shaded area ). Some of the Pop III populations in our sample are sufficiently far from nearby stars to be found in a single resolution element of NIRSpec/IFU, with no contamination from Pop IIs. The dashed, light-blue/purple lines indicate the maximum size of HeIII/HII regions around the Pop III particles with our fiducial setup (see also Figure 9 ), showing that the emitting regions may overlap with Pop IIs in some cases, but they would be mostly unresolved with NIRSpec/IFU.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：Pop III宿主晕的示意图，显示了Pop III恒星粒子到晕质心（CM）及其最近Pop II粒子的距离。虽然所有粒子在模拟中在物理上是分离的，但它们的HII（浅蓝色）和HeIII（紫色）区域可能重叠，具体取决于电离区域的各自大小。右图：对于样本中的所有Pop III粒子，最近Pop II粒子的距离作为到CM距离的函数。显示了NIRSpec/IFU在z=10和z=6（细/粗金色虚线）处的分辨率元和视场作为参考，以及Maiolino et al. (2024, 2026) 识别的GN-z11的HeII团块到星系中心的推断距离（蓝色阴影区域）。样本中的一些Pop III星族距离附近恒星足够远，以至于可以位于NIRSpec/IFU的单个分辨率元内，且不受Pop II的污染。浅蓝色/紫色虚线表示在我们的基准设置下Pop III粒子周围HeIII/HII区域的最大尺寸（另见图9），表明在某些情况下发射区域可能与Pop II重叠，但使用NIRSpec/IFU大多无法分辨。
